name: Creation of Outlook C2 Macro File
notes:
This rule detects creation of Outlook C2 macro file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: '@ScoubiMtl'
SIGMA Title: Outlook C2 Macro Creation
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of a macro file for Outlook. Goes with win_outlook_c2_registry_key. VbaProject.OTM is explicitly mentioned in T1137. Particularly interesting if both events Registry & File Creation happens at the same time.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
when the event matches LOWER("File File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft\outlook\%' AND LOWER("Filename") == 'vbaproject.otm' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Creation of Outlook C2 Macro File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
AND when the event matches LOWER("File File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft\outlook\%' AND LOWER("Filename") == 'vbaproject.otm' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Creation of Outlook C2 Macro File
Event description: Detects creation of Outlook C2 macro file.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
